news.title: Na bijna 30 jaar sluit sterrenrestaurant Kommilfoo in Antwerpen de deuren: “Tijd om even adem te halen na een lange sprint” - HLN
news.summary:
# Summary

After nearly 30 years of operation, the acclaimed Michelin-starred restaurant **Kommilfoo in Antwerp** is closing its doors, with the owner citing a need to rest after a long career sprint. This is significant for visitors to Antwerp because it marks the end of one of the city's most prestigious fine dining establishments. The closure represents the loss of a notable gastronomic destination that has been a cornerstone of Antwerp's restaurant scene for three decades.
